content: While scientific advancements in cloning technology are progressing, ethical, legal, and technical challenges make it uncertain whether human cloning will be achieved or accepted within the next hundred years. Current regulations and societal norms largely oppose human cloning, which could hinder its development.
raw_content: While scientific advancements in cloning technology are progressing, ethical, legal, and technical challenges make it uncertain whether human cloning will be achieved or accepted within the next hundred years. Current regulations and societal norms largely oppose human cloning, which could hinder its development.
